rationale: Turn 1 stayed asleep and directly added the new transfer-dispute channel instead of firing anti-spiral triage and braking the repeated local repair pattern, so the case cannot pass. Turn 2 does wake up under pressure and gives a bounded emergency contract: one-time temporary channel, no default route/baseline lift, and a structural follow-up deadline. Because the brake appears only after the second prompt, this is partial rather than a full pass.
